title: Large Storage Box, Shelf Storage Baskets with Handles, Foldable Fabric Storage Baskets Home Organizer for Shelves Wardrobes Cupboards (41x31x21cm/1 Pack, Light Grey&Grey)
features: Large Storage Box: PWVMWM Storage box for wardrobe are rectangular in shape and of size 16.1L x 12.2W x 8.3H inches (41x31x21cm). These sturdy canvas storage boxes provide a solution to many storage needs, perfect for bedrooms, shelves, living rooms and bathrooms: Organizing and storing home products, kid’s toys, pet products, bathroom storage, office products, clothes, shoes, towel, blanket, scarfs, sports gears, many other uses.

Hight Quality Material: Durable and high-quality material make this linen storage basket last a good long time, canvas (outer), thick EVA material (middle support layer), and smooth polyester (inner) . There is a metal frame on the top to keep the large basket storage’s shape. The thickened bottom enhances the load-bearing capacity of storage boxes for shelves.

Foldable Storage Box with Handles: The foldable feature allows you to save space when not in use, just fold the basket down flat. The large fabric storage basket comes with two handles for easy slide in and pull out of shelves or wardrobe.

Easy to Clean: The linen cupboard storage baskets are easy to clean, dusting the basket with a soft dry cloth is recommended. Spot clean with light soapy water when needed. Machine washing is not recommended because of the metal frame inside.

Exquisite Gift: The modern and simple style design makes these linen storage box simple yet exquisite, perfectly fit in your rooms layout and household decor, enjoy the relaxing ambiance of the soft color scheme. They also make a lovely yet practical gift basket for friends and family for birthdays, weddings, housewarmings, or any other Gift-Giving occasion!
description: Product Description The PWVMWM storage basket helps to free up space and keep all items organized and tidy. Classify different items save your time and keep your home nice, tidy, organized, also neutral color minimalist design basket decorate your home. Fabric storage basket perfects for organizing a clothing closet, bedroom, bathroom, living room, studyroom, babyroom or even an office. It is so universal that can work anywhere you are looking to get organized. The height of these baskets is so suitable as a drawer ! And they are perfect for narrow spaces, such as under the coffee table, on the closet, dressing table, etc. Gift Basket Makes a thoughtful gift for any housewarming, back to school, babyshower, Easter and Christmas gift. Ideal toy baskets or shelf baskets and more. Care Tip: The storage box set comes with compression packing which may result in wrinkled in long-distance transit, we advise filling in something or use iron to help recover the shape. The fabric storage box are easy to clean, dusting the basket with a soft dry cloth is recommended. Spot clean with light soapy water when needed. Not recommended to machine wash as there are a metal frame. See More
